prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, generate a tight-binding protein binder targeting Hepatitis B core antigen (HBcAg) (hepatovirus nucleocapsid antigen) expressed by Hepatitis B virus. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. specify a protocol for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Hepatitis B core antigen (HBcAg); organism: Hepatitis B virus; catalogue version v1.0
